subcodes.first_line: The mercy of the All-Merciful be upon every nation that hath believed in the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رحمة الرحمن علی کل امة امنت بالرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
